faqs.question: What does your Valley Stream rat extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of entry points, strategic trap and bait station placement, exclusion work to seal access points, contaminated insulation removal if needed, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination and prevent future infestations.
